title: ononis hircina var. intermedia
intro: Ononis hircina var. intermedia, also known as the 'Sickle-leaved Restharrow', is a perennial herb that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Ononis hircina var. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
